nasb.text: And to the eyes of the sons of Israel the appearance of the glory of the Lord was like a consuming fire on the mountain top.

esv.text: Now the appearance of the glory of the Lord was like a devouring fire on the top of the mountain in the sight of the people of Israel.

cnv.text: 耶和華榮耀的景象，在以色列人眼前，好像在山頂上出現烈火。

ccb.text: 在以色列人眼中，耶和华的荣耀在山上好像烈火。
